params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?
params.context: PC2 claude-in-chrome MCP first wave. Target = decisive verdict on prior #881 INCONCLUSIVE_submit_failed (windows-mcp UIA could not dispatch React submit on Gemini 3.0). claude-in-chrome (CDP-based, DOM-aware) should dispatch mouse/keyboard via CDP and resolve. Mission anchor: PII prompt → warning visible on user screen. tag=v2.2.4-d29d868-postfix-pc2-wave1.

test_steps: 1. Open URL via claude-in-chrome (logged in if applicable; skip if NEEDS_LOGIN)
2. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) to ensure fresh APF connection
3. Submit PII prompt via CDP keyboard/mouse dispatch — windows-mcp UIA fallback NOT required
4. Observe DOM/network: warning bubble OR replacement page OR alert
6. result.json: warning_rendered, engine_intercept_fired, notes (claude-in-chrome dispatch path 동작 여부 + INCONCLUSIVE → decisive verdict 전환)

verdict_criteria.OK: warning visible to user (any delivery method) — mission satisfied
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL: engine intercept fired but no visible warning
verdict_criteria.FAIL_NOT_RENDERED: engine fired + DOM inject but invisible
verdict_criteria.FAIL_INVALID_TEST: PII prompt 미제출 (dispatch tool 한계) — engine 미도달
verdict_criteria.FAIL: no engine activity and no warning

notes: PC2 claude-in-chrome MCP — DOM-aware navigation, CDP keyboard/mouse dispatch. Decisive verdict for prior #881 INCONCLUSIVE_submit_failed (React click bypass). tag=v2.2.4-d29d868-postfix-pc2-wave1
